     the Fermi energy is     3.3559 ev

!    total energy              =   -8183.90267862 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000002 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.23988338 Ry

     one-electron contribution = -191987.26189452 Ry
